scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/api-service" "npm run dev -w packages/indexer-service" "npm run dev -w packages/web-app"
scripts.start:api: npm run stop:api && cd packages/api-service && npm run dev
scripts.start:indexer: npm run stop:indexer && cd packages/indexer-service && npm run dev
scripts.start:webapp: npm run stop:webapp && cd packages/web-app && npm run dev
scripts.stop:webapp: for p in 5173 5174 5175 5176; do lsof -ti :$p | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; true
scripts.stop: npm run stop:api && npm run stop:indexer && npm run stop:webapp
